title: Indulgent Iquicha-Style Mexican Pasta Huaraches
description: A pungent and crunchy Mexican dish featuring bowtie pasta, kombu-cold-extract, and wrapped in a pandan leaf. Perfect for meal prep and raw-friendly diets.

ingredients.name: Bowtie pasta
ingredients.notes: Any type of bowtie pasta will work.

ingredients.name: Kombu
ingredients.notes: Look for sheets of kombu with no added ingredients.

ingredients.name: Pandan paste
ingredients.notes: Pandan paste adds a unique flavor to the dish.

ingredients.name: Gochujang
ingredients.notes: Gochujang adds a spicy and savory flavor.

ingredients.name: Avocado oil
ingredients.notes: Use a neutral-tasting oil like avocado oil.

ingredients.name: Lime juice
ingredients.notes: Fresh lime juice adds a bright and tangy flavor.

ingredients.name: Chopped cilantro
ingredients.notes: Add fresh cilantro for extra flavor and texture.

ingredients.name: Diced tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Canned diced tomatoes work well in this recipe.

ingredients.name: Smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: Smoked paprika adds a deep and smoky flavor.

ingredients.name: Salt and pepper
ingredients.notes: Use salt and pepper to taste.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: Use water as needed to create a sauce.

instructions: Cook the bowtie pasta according to the package instructions.
In a separate pot, make a kombu-cold-extract by simmering the kombu sheets in water for 10 minutes.
Strain the kombu and discard the solids.
In a blender, combine the kombu-cold-extract, pandan paste, gochujang, and lime juice. Blend until smooth.
Heat the avocado oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the diced tomatoes and smoked paprika. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the cooked bowtie pasta to the pan and toss with the tomato mixture.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
To assemble the huaraches, place a portion of the pasta mixture onto a pandan leaf, followed by a sprinkle of chopped cilantro.
Roll up the pandan leaf to form a tight cylinder.
Cut the huaraches into halves or quarters, depending on the size desired.
